title: Phase and task criteria must be binary outcome-based or invalid
description: Both levels' criteria must be binary outcome-based or invalid — phase success_criteria and task success_criteria must each be binary and outcome-based, or they are invalid.

evidence.reference: no constraint that phase success_criteria are binary and outcome-based
no constraint that task criteria are binary and outcome-based

impact: Criteria at both levels can be non-binary or non-outcome-based.
proposed_resolution: Constrain phase and task success_criteria so each criterion must be binary and outcome-based, or it is invalid.
